promptTemplate: A large-scale pop surrealist artwork of a chaotic conglomeration of {{face_count}} faces teetering atop one another to form an eerie human totem. Each face is fabricated from {{material}}, capturing a {{expression}} expression with exaggerated, oversized eyes and dramatically expressive features. The faces span from {{era}} aesthetics, each with {{skin_quality}} skin and {{feature_style}} facial features. The overall composition has {{visual_texture}}, presented in a {{art_register}} style. Photographed as if a {{photo_quality}} photograph, captured on a Leica C9 using Kodak 400 film.

values.text: bright fleshy silicone replicating human skin
a precarious equilibrium between reality and fantasy

tags.label: Glorpy Heads — Eden p5 + img2img Pipeline
tags.description: Converted from 2-step Eden pipeline: p5.js generative geometry → img2img-comfy (epicphotogasm_v1, denoising 0.83). Original had no variables — the img2img prompt was fully fixed. Variables synthesized from the rich descriptive prompt language to make the template generative. p5 sketch preserved verbatim.
